metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.11-beta.15
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Prevents Enter in Pitch, Rate, or Gain editing from triggering asset insertion. - Adds state-aware stereo, left, right, mono, and multichannel audition icons. - Centers mono/left/right audition using mirrored SWS preview outputs. - Adds Ctrl/Shift/Ctrl+A multichannel lane selection with waveform highlighting. - Documents the SWS limitation for arbitrary multichannel source isolation.
